mapper.sql: id, agent_id, target_id, target_type, verification_code, challenge_text, answer, attempt_count, max_attempts, expires_at, status, created_at, consecutive_failures, locked_until
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO verification_challenges (agent_id, target_id, target_type, verification_code, challenge_text, answer, attempt_count, max_attempts, expires_at, status, consecutive_failures, locked_until) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{verificationCode}, #{challengeText}, #{answer}, #{attemptCount}, #{maxAttempts}, #{expiresAt}, #{status}, #{consecutiveFailures}, #{lockedUntil})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM verification_challenges WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE verification_challenges SET consecutive_failures = #{consecutiveFailures}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil} WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND status = 'locked'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM verification_challenges WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND status = 'locked' AND locked_until > NOW()
